title: dendrobium bigibbum var. bigibbum
intro: Dendrobium bigibbum var. bigibbum, also known as the Queen Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Australia and the Pacific Islands. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dendrobium bigibbum var. bigibbum include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a wound dressing due to its antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a tea or tincture, which is often used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
